Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company, is present. Jason Bandara
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Charles Spurrier, is present.
Attorney,Aaron Farmer, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Douglas, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-15-2010 is vacated.
